overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a historic stone city with Gothic architecture. The player walks through narrow corridors and alleys, transitioning through a covered archway into an overgrown garden area where an NPC is encountered. The atmosphere is moody and overcast with diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor between high historic walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow stone corridor with tall walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall gray stone wall with vertical architectural details
tall gray stone wall with curved niches
flat stone tile pathway between the walls
large historic building with vertical columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow stone corridor between high historic walls. The path is paved with flat stone tiles, and a large columned building is visible in the distance ahead. The atmosphere is quiet and enclosed with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alley with colonnaded historic building

events.description: exits narrow corridor into wider cobblestone alley with large columned building on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone alley beside a massive columned stone building

entered.detail: historic stone building with arched doorways on the left side of the alley
dark arched passageway entrance appearing on the left side ahead

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow corridor into a wider cobblestone alley. A massive columned building dominates the right side, while a stone building with arched doorways lines the left. An archway entrance becomes visible ahead on the left as the player continues walking.

events.description: turns left and enters dark covered archway between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark stone archway tunnel with a hanging lantern visible ahead

entered.detail: covered stone tunnel with arched ceiling connecting two buildings
rough stone wall of the tunnel on the left side
rough stone wall of the tunnel on the right side
lit lantern hanging from the tunnel ceiling providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, covered stone archway that serves as a passage between buildings. The tunnel is dimly lit by a hanging lantern, with rough stone walls on both sides. The ground transitions from cobblestone to dirt as the player moves toward the light at the far end of the tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown garden path between stone walls

events.description: exits archway into garden area with vegetation and flowers
interaction prompt appears to talk to NPC Gin-Wulm

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden path toward a standing character in the distance

notable_agents.action: standing still in the path facing the player, identified as Gin-Wulm with talk interaction available

entered.detail: narrow dirt pathway with patches of grass and small plants
tall stone wall lining the left side of the garden path
tall stone wall lining the right side of the garden path
bush with vibrant purple flowers growing along the left wall
green bushes and plants growing along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dark archway into an overgrown garden path between stone walls. The area features dirt ground with patches of grass, purple flowering bushes on the left, and green vegetation on the right. An NPC named Gin-Wulm stands in the path ahead, and as the player approaches, a talk interaction prompt appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic stone corridor into a lush, overgrown garden. It begins by moving through a narrow passage between high historic walls toward a distant columned building, before emerging into a wider cobblestone alley flanked by arched doorways. The camera then transitions into a dark, covered stone archway where the lighting dims to a single hanging lantern and the ground shifts from stone to dirt. Finally, the scene opens from the tunnel into a bright garden path filled with purple flowering bushes and green vegetation, coming to a halt before an NPC named Gin-Wulm as a talk interaction prompt appears.
